text_original: chat text are deleted if I go off the app and back on it needs to be permanent
text_zh: 如果我退出应用再回来，聊天记录就会被删除，我需要它们永久保存。
reply_original: Hi there! I am truly sorry for this frustrating experience. Your chat history should definitely be saved automatically. To help us investigate why your messages are disappearing, please email your UID and a description of the issue to support@fantachat.ai. We will prioritize fixing this for you so your memories stay permanent!
reply_zh: 你好！对于这次令人沮丧的体验，我深表歉意。您的聊天记录理应是自动保存的。为了帮助我们调查您的消息消失的原因，请将您的 UID 和问题描述发送邮件至 support@fantachat.ai。我们将优先为您解决此问题，确保您的记忆能够永久保存！
